summary: Completed backend API testing for Zuba House Phase 1 Critical Fixes. Server healthy, coupon/gift card systems working, product API functional. Only Stripe integration blocked by placeholder API keys.

critical_bugs.issue: Stripe API key is invalid - using placeholder key 'sk_test_placeholder'
critical_bugs.impact: Payment processing completely non-functional until real Stripe keys provided

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot create Stripe checkout sessions due to invalid API key
critical_bugs.impact: Mobile app payment flow will fail - users cannot complete purchases

configuration_issues.recommendation: Replace with actual Stripe test/live secret key from Stripe dashboard

passed_tests: Server Health Check - Healthy with database connected
Root Endpoint - Returns server info correctly
Coupon Validation API - Handles valid/invalid codes properly
Coupon Apply API - Processes cart discount calculations
Gift Card Validation API - Handles valid/invalid codes properly
Gift Card Apply API - Processes cart gift card applications
Product Listing API - Returns products (empty but working)
Product Search API - Handles search queries correctly
Product Pagination API - Supports page/limit parameters
JSON Error Handling - Properly handles malformed requests
CORS Configuration - Headers configured for cross-origin requests

critical_fixes: Replace STRIPE_SECRET_KEY placeholder with actual Stripe API key (sk_test_... for testing or sk_live_... for production)
Verify Stripe webhook secret (STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET) is also configured properly
Test payment flow end-to-end once real Stripe keys are provided
recommended_actions: Add sample coupon and gift card data to database for more realistic testing
Add sample product data to database for frontend integration testing
Consider adding environment variable validation on server startup to warn about placeholder keys
user_requirements: Obtain Stripe API keys from Stripe dashboard (test keys for development, live keys for production)
Update server environment variables with real Stripe credentials
